subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances that have wafted from the gardens of God's bounty! Say: God hath, by the hand of might and power, opened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات انتشرت من ریاض موهبه الله قل قد فتح الله بید القدره و القوه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
